what i do

hero.subtitle: SOFTWARE ARCHITECT
hero.description: Hello! I'm a software architect and embedded systems engineer. I love bridging the gap between hardware and the cloud, turning complex problems into elegant, scalable solutions. From robust backends to pixel-perfect web experiences, I'm here to bring meaningful ideas to life.

projects.title: Current Projects
projects.description: A selection of my recent technical endeavors, ranging from IoT hardware integrations to full-stack scalable web applications.

project1.title: Class Roll Call Management System
project1.description: A real-time attendance tracking system for educational institutions featuring dynamic QR codes, robust backend API, Redis caching, and an administrative dashboard.

project2.title: Open-Source Web 3.0 & IoT Mobile Integration
project2.description: TÜBİTAK 2209-B Awarded Project. A modular IIoT platform for industrial systems enabling real-time data collection from PLC using STM32, Modbus, FreeRTOS, and Node.js.

project3.title: Delivery Boy Mobile Application
project3.description: Real-time order tracking service for e-commerce with Spring Boot backend, native Android (Java) app, and native iOS (Swift) app for cross-platform delivery management.

project4.title: TFEncryption Chat
project4.description: A desktop chat application utilizing WebRTC, Cactoos, and Concurrency. Allows secure file and message transfers encrypted via SPN, SHA256, or MD5 algorithms.

entertainment.title: Fueling The Creativity
entertainment.description: When I'm not architecting software or soldering IoT circuits, you'll probably find me cycling long distances or vibing to my favorite playlists. Here is what keeps me fueled.
entertainment.playlistDesc: Embed your Spotify or Apple Music playlist here to share your vibes with visitors.

salutbabe.title: SAFELY FROM MOTHER TO MOTHER
salutbabe.description: Second-hand baby clothes sales platform. Safely sell your babies' outgrown clothes, meet their new needs at affordable prices.
